title: DN21 1LQ, Kerry Ingredients (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/NP3332PJ/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Kerry Ingredients (UK) Limited Installation name: Gainsborough Grain Mill Permit number: EPR/NP3332PJ  "
